command.abortCommit: Generate Commit Message with OpenCodeGo - Stop
config.title: OpenCode Go Copilot
config.commitLanguage.desc: Language for generated Git commit messages. When set to "auto", the language is detected from recent commit history. Defaults to English if no history exists.
config.commitLanguage.auto.desc: Auto-detect language from recent commit history (defaults to English)
config.commitModel.desc: Model ID used for commit message generation.
config.commitMessagePrompt.desc: Custom system prompt for commit message generation.
config.requestTimeout.desc: Maximum time (in milliseconds) for a single request. Default: 600000 (10 minutes). Increase if you encounter timeout errors with long responses.
config.recentCommitsCount.desc: Number of recent commits to analyze for style reference when generating commit messages. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 10.
config.commitIncludeCommitDiff.desc: When enabled, include the actual code changes (diff) of recent commits in the style reference, helping the model generate messages that better match the project's commit style. Default: false.
config.commitAttachContextFiles.desc: When enabled, attach the content of AGENTS.md and README.md from the repository root as additional context for commit message generation, helping the model better understand the project. Default: true.
